byContinuingYouAgreeToOur: By continuing, you agree to our
introLocationTopDescription: Location helps us recognize patterns like your commute, daily routine, frequently visited places, and how your environment may shape your lifestyle.
introLocationBtmDescription: This helps create more accurate and meaningful insights in the web version.
introHealthTopDescription: Health data helps us understand signals like sleep, steps, activity, heart rate, and recovery patterns.
introHealthBtmDescription: By connecting this, your web dashboard can show more personalized insights about your energy, rest, stress, and overall lifestyle rhythm.
introScreenTopDescription: Screen time helps us understand app usage, unlock patterns, focus time, bedtime phone use, and digital habits.
introScreenBtmDescription: This helps your web dashboard create better insights around attention, balance, rest, and productivity.
connectorTopDescription: Connect your approved data sources so we can better understand your daily routines, activity, movement, and digital habits.
connectorBtmDescription: This app only helps connect and organize your data. Your personalized insights, reports, and recommendations will be available in the web version.
introNotificationTopDescription: Notifications let us share timely updates like new insights, data sync reminders, and important changes to your connected sources.
introNotificationBtmDescription: This helps you stay informed about your progress and never miss meaningful updates from your web dashboard.
reassurance: You're always in control of what you choose to connect.
